item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡追踪：仅有伊朗关联船只通过海峡
item.description: 霍尔木兹海峡的航运已连续第七天近乎停滞，过去24小时内仅有与伊朗有关联的船只通过该海峡。【原文：Strait of Hormuz transit remains near a standstill for a seventh day, with Iran-linked ships the only commercial vessels making the crossing in the past 24 hours.】

item.title: 《寻梦环游记》首周末斩获4600万美元，迪士尼皮克斯强势回归
item.description: 皮克斯动画工作室出品的最新动画电影《飞屋环游记》首映即成为美加地区票房冠军，创下4600万美元的票房收入。【原文：Hoppers, the new animated picture from Walt Disney Co.’s Pixar studio, debuted as the highest-grossing film in US and Canadian theaters, delivering $46 million in ticket sales.】

item.title: 美国能源部长称石油市场中的"恐慌溢价"将逐渐消退
item.description: 美国能源部长克里斯·赖特试图驳斥市场对中东战争长期化的警告，称全球能源供应充足，油价飙升反映的是不会持久的"恐慌溢价"。【原文：US Energy Secretary Chris Wright sought to counter market warnings about an extended Middle East war, saying global energy supplies are sufficient and the surge in oil prices reflects a “fear premium” that won’t last.】

item.title: 埃及镑跌至新低，伊朗战争冲击波引发动荡
item.description: 埃及镑创下两年贬值以来最大单日跌幅，这个中东人口最多的国家持续受到伊朗战争冲击波的冲击。【原文：Egypt’s pound posted its biggest single-day drop since a devaluation two years ago, as the Middle East’s most populous country continues to be buffeted by the shockwaves of the Iran war.】

item.title: 油价玉米价狂飙 凸显伊朗战争市场压力
item.description: 随着伊朗战争导致供应中断，原油及其他大宗商品价格飙升，交易员们正蜂拥进入期权市场。【原文：Traders are piling into options as supply disruptions from the war in Iran send oil and other commodity prices soaring.】

item.title: 债券交易员本已应接不暇，"随后战争爆发"
item.description: 早在上周末之前，太平洋投资管理公司的丹尼尔·伊瓦辛就已为市场动荡做好了准备。【原文：Even before last weekend, Pacific Investment Management Co.’s Daniel Ivascyn was preparing for turbulence.】

item.title: 伊拉克石油产量骤降约60%，因伊朗战争阻断油轮运输
item.description: 伊拉克石油产量已暴跌约60%，因伊朗战争导致运载该国原油的油轮严重短缺。【原文：Iraq’s oil production has collapsed by about 60% as the Iran war means there aren’t enough tankers to load the nation’s crude.】

item.title: 伊朗冲突考验新兴市场复苏态势
item.description: 伊朗战争重创了华尔街最青睐的交易之一——新兴市场。【原文：The war in Iran has dealt a blow to one of Wall Street’s favorite trades — emerging markets.】

item.title: 卡塔尔液化天然气供应中断，更多液化天然气运输船转向亚洲
item.description: 由于中东局势紧张导致全球供应减少，加剧了对液化天然气的争夺，多批原定运往欧洲的液化天然气已改道亚洲。【原文：Several more liquefied natural gas shipments have diverted toward Asia from their course to Europe as tensions in the Middle East curb global supply and boost competition for the fuel.】

item.title: 苹果"Ultra"系列产品扩张计划即将启动，继MacBook Neo发布之后
item.description: 此外：新款iMac正在研发中【原文：Also: New iMacs Are in the Works】

item.title: 汽油、柴油、航空燃油价格攀升，伊朗战争导致供应受阻
item.description: 无论是在驾车、飞行还是仅仅试图为房屋供暖，全球消费者正迅速感受到伊朗战争扩大带来的影响。【原文：Whether they’re driving, flying or just trying to heat their homes, consumers worldwide are fast feeling the effects of the widening Iran war.】

item.title: 随着更多海湾产油巨头减产，石油市场动荡或将加剧
item.description: 石油市场的混乱局面在未来几天可能进一步加剧，随着伊朗战争持续封锁霍尔木兹海峡，导致油轮无法通行，以及美国考虑扩大在伊朗境内的打击目标范围，更多产油设施将被迫停产。【原文：The chaos that has gripped the oil market looks set to deepen in the coming days, with more production being shut off as the war in Iran keeps the Strait of Hormuz closed to tankers, and the US considers widening its range of targets in the country.】

item.title: 瑞士将现金纳入宪法以防其消失
item.description: 瑞士投票决定将现金流通权写入宪法，此举旨在抵御实物货币消亡的趋势。【原文：Switzerland voted to enshrine the availability of cash in its constitution, assenting to a push designed to guard against the demise of physical money.】

item.title: 沙特阿美股价创2023年以来最大涨幅，战火搅动能源市场
item.description: 随着伊朗战争进入第二周，沙特阿美周日创下2023年5月以来最大涨幅。这场战争引发的供应中断可能导致全球市场重启时油价走高。【原文：Saudi Aramco jumped the most since May 2023 on Sunday as the Iran war entered its second week, prompting supply disruptions that may send oil prices higher when global markets reopen.】

item.title: 英格兰银行或对忽视新一轮能源冲击持谨慎态度
item.description: 本周晚些时候，英国央行决策者将迎来首次简报会，为3月19日的利率决议做准备。关键问题在于，他们愿意在多大程度上容忍这场可能使通胀偏离轨道的能源价格冲击。【原文：Later this week, Bank of England policymakers will receive their first briefings as preparations for the March 19 interest-rate decision get under way. The question is how far they are willing to tolerate an energy-price shock that is threatening to blow inflation off course.】

item.title: 财联社报道：中国女性管理近万亿美元资产
item.description: 财联社周日援引Wind信息公司数据显示，截至3月6日，中国女性基金经理管理的资产总额达6.8万亿元人民币（合9840亿美元）。【原文：Female fund managers in China oversaw a total of 6.8 trillion yuan ($984 billion) in assets as of March 6, Cailian reported on Sunday, citing data from Wind Information Co.】

item.title: OpenAI机器人部门负责人因公司与五角大楼合作协议辞职
item.description: OpenAI机器人团队负责人周六宣布辞职，称公司与五角大楼达成协议，将在其机密网络内部署人工智能模型，此举是其辞职的原因。【原文：The head of OpenAI’s robotics team resigned Saturday, citing the company’s deal to deploy its artificial intelligence models within the Pentagon’s classified network as the cause.】

item.title: 特朗普称需有充分理由才能向伊朗派遣地面部队
item.description: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普在空军一号上与记者会面时表示，美国向伊朗派遣地面部队必须有"非常充分的理由"。【原文：There would have to be a “very good reason” for the US to deploy ground troops to Iran, President Donald Trump says in a meeting with the press on Air Force One.】

item.title: 美国通胀指标在伊朗战争前可能已出现分歧
item.description: 在2月份就业报告令人失望、挑战了劳动力市场趋于稳定的预期之后，本周将公布两份通胀报告，其中包括美联储偏好的价格指标。【原文：A pair of inflation reports, including the Federal Reserve’s preferred price gauge, surface in the coming week after a dismal February jobs report that challenged perceptions the labor market is stabilizing.】

item.title: 交易员抢购衍生品，风险加剧：《信贷周刊》
item.description: 伊朗战争。美国就业市场持续疲软。人工智能与整个行业的潜在消亡。私人信贷压力日益增大。【原文：War in Iran. A weakening US jobs market. Artificial intelligence and the potential demise of whole industries. Growing pressure on private credit.】

item.title: Polymarket创始人称战争押注正面临日益增长的抵制
item.description: Polymarket创始人兼首席执行官谢恩·科普兰表示，预测市场行业与战争相关的合约正面临日益增长的风险，并承认日益提升的知名度带来"更多资金，更多问题"——这位行业领军人物直言不讳地承认，其旗舰产品正面临沦为政治负担的风险。【原文：Polymarket founder and CEO Shayne Coplan said the prediction market industry’s war-related contracts face growing risks and acknowledged that rising visibility brings “more money, more problems” — a blunt concession from one of the sector’s most prominent figures that its flagship product threatens to become a political liability.】

item.title: 据称，AtaiBeckley正在探索其主要迷幻药物的多种方案
item.description: 据知情人士透露，AtaiBeckley公司正与顾问合作，为其旗舰迷幻药物候选产品探索多种方案。【原文：AtaiBeckley Inc. is working with advisers to explore options for its flagship psychedelic drug candidate, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 五角大楼在人工智能领域的人类中心论之争中启用前优步高管
item.description: 埃米尔·迈克尔，国防部负责研究与工程事务的副部长。【原文：Emil Michael, under secretary of defense for research and engineering.】

item.title: 空客携手莱茵金属、OHB公司开发军用卫星
item.description: 据知情人士透露，空客防务与航天公司正考虑与德国防务巨头莱茵金属集团及本土卫星制造商OHB公司联合竞标，为德国联邦国防军打造类似Starlink的卫星互联网服务。【原文：Airbus Defence and Space is mulling a joint bid with German defense giant Rheinmetall AG and domestic satellite manufacturer OHB SE to build a Starlink-like internet service for the Bundeswehr armed forces, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 第二艘自称中国籍的散货船通过霍尔木兹海峡
item.description: 另一艘散货船在穿越霍尔木兹海峡时亮起中国船旗。这条位于波斯湾入口处的狭窄水道因该地区多次遭遇袭击，已实质性关闭一周。【原文：Another bulk carrier signaled it was Chinese-owned as it sailed through the Strait of Hormuz, the narrow waterway at the mouth of the Persian Gulf that’s been effectively closed for a week due to multiple attacks in the area.】

item.title: 稳定币公司押注人工智能代理支付，而该领域几乎尚不存在
item.description: Circle Internet Group Inc.与Stripe Inc.正竞相为一个尚未存在的世界构建支付系统——在这个世界里，自主人工智能代理每天进行数百万次交易，使用稳定币结算而非刷信用卡。【原文：Circle Internet Group Inc. and Stripe Inc. are racing to build payments systems for a world that doesn’t exist yet — one where autonomous AI agents transact millions of times a day, settling in stablecoins instead of swiping credit cards.】

item.title: 科威特因霍尔木兹海峡运输放缓削减原油及炼油产量
item.description: 科威特作为欧佩克第五大产油国，表示因霍尔木兹海峡航运放缓，已削减原油及炼油产量。【原文：Kuwait, OPEC’s fifth-biggest producer, said it has reduced oil and refinery production following the slowdown of shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.】

item.title: 劳埃德·布兰克费恩在"焦虑的市场"中看到地缘政治风险
item.description: 这位前高盛首席执行官表示，他的经验提醒他，"清算"终将到来。【原文：The former Goldman Sachs CEO says his experience warns him that “a reckoning” is coming at some point.】

item.title: 贝莱德零售私募信贷计划遭遇市场恐慌
item.description: 当贝莱德公司豪掷120亿美元收购HPS投资伙伴公司，并大肆宣扬将向数百万散户投资者兜售复杂债务产品以获取丰厚回报的前景时，私募信贷市场似乎迎来了黄金时代。【原文：It looked like a golden age of private credit when BlackRock Inc. plunked down $12 billion to buy HPS Investment Partners and crowed about the prospect of selling millions of retail investors on juicy returns from complex debt.】

item.title: 特朗普的非洲矿产计划面临漫长征途，以期与主导地位的中国抗衡
item.description: 当华盛顿试图达成更大交易时，北京仍遥遥领先。【原文：While Washington is trying to make bigger deals, Beijing remains far ahead.】
